def generate_api_endpoints(base_url: str, resources: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    endpoints = []
    for resource in resources:
        endpoint = f"{base_url}/api/v1/{resource}"
        endpoints.append(endpoint)
    return endpoints


def build_insert_statements(table_name: str, records: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    statements = []
    for record in records:
        cols = ", ".join(record.keys())
        vals = ", ".join(f"'{v}'" for v in record.values())
        stmt = f"INSERT INTO {table_name} ({cols}) VALUES ({vals});"
        statements.append(stmt)
    return statements


def create_log_messages(prefix: str, events: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    messages = []
    for event in events:
        msg = f"[{prefix}] [{event['level']}] {event['message']} at {event['timestamp']}"
        messages.append(msg)
    return messages
